name: autosearch
description: Self-evolving deep research. Gets smarter every time you use it. Searches across channels, synthesizes cited reports, and learns which queries and platforms work best.

EXA_API_KEY.title: Exa API Key
EXA_API_KEY.description: Exa API key for semantic web search (optional)

TAVILY_API_KEY.title: Tavily API Key
TAVILY_API_KEY.description: Tavily API key for research-oriented web search (optional)

SEARXNG_URL.title: SearXNG URL
SEARXNG_URL.description: SearXNG instance URL for meta-search (optional, default: http://localhost:8888)
